key_evidence: May 20: 8,000 layoffs (~10% workforce) begun; integrity team (hate-speech / malicious content removal) explicitly cut
Zuckerberg memo: 'Success isn't a given' — AI infrastructure prioritized over platform safety function
Cybersecurity and content design teams also cut
AI tracking software installed on employee computers without opt-out (UK UTAW unionization response)
Carry-forward: 2024 NLRB ruling on unlawful restriction of organizing rights

events.label: 8,000-person layoff including integrity team (dual-dimension compound event)

methodology_note: First application of PLATFORM-SAFETY-TEAM-LAYOFF-AS-DUAL-DIMENSION-EVENT methodology novel flag (scanner-proposed May 27). Single compound event with apportioned dimensional impact across EMP/ACT/SYS/INT/BND/AWR. EMP and ACC floor-locked; sub-threshold direction documented. Founder review encouraged on the dual-dimension convention.
